summary: Comprehensive testing of Structures page refactoring complete. The page successfully combines the old 'Entities' and 'Hierarchy' pages into a single unified page with tabs. All 10 features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement possible

passed_tests: Entities tab shows list of entities with cards (7 entities displayed)
Hierarchy tab shows relationship tree with nested structure
Hierarchy tab shows relationships table with ownership details
New Entity button opens modal and can create entity (TEST_AutomationEntity created)
Add Relationship button works on hierarchy tab - modal opens with all fields
Tab switching between Entities and Hierarchy works smoothly
URL updates with ?tab=entities or ?tab=hierarchy on tab change
Entity card click navigates to entity detail page (/entities/{id})
Sidebar shows single 'Structures' link (no separate Entities/Hierarchy links)
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: StructuresPage.js properly implements tabs using Shadcn UI Tabs component
PASS: URL search params correctly sync with active tab (useSearchParams hook)
PASS: Entity and Relationship modals have proper data-testid attributes for testing
PASS: Old routes /entities and /structure correctly redirect to new unified page
PASS: Sidebar has single 'Structures' navigation item
PASS: Entity cards are clickable and navigate to detail page
PASS: Hierarchy tree renders nested parent-child relationships correctly
MINOR: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_AutomationEntity during testing (can be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structures page refactoring verified. The old EntitiesPage and StructurePage (Hierarchy) have been merged into a single StructuresPage.js with two tabs. Key data-testids: structures-page, tab-entities, tab-hierarchy, create-entity-btn, add-relationship-btn, entity-modal, relationship-modal, submit-entity-btn, submit-relationship-btn, entity-card-{id}. Old routes /entities and /structure redirect properly to the new unified page.

entities_tab.content: Grid of entity cards with name, type, legal name, governing law, EIN
